summary: Independent AIQL-style review of the Portfolio Proof Cycle 001 WorkLoops outcome found the synthetic hosted lifecycle evidence usable for first-class WorkLoops review-evidence attachment/readback testing. The review is independent of WorkLoop completion metadata and was produced as a manual structured AIQL artifact with no external service calls.

findings.title: Independent review artifact created
findings.summary: This artifact is authored in AIQL's WorkLoop review evidence shape and is not embedded in the WorkLoop completion metadata fixture.
findings.recommendation: Use this JSON as the review-evidence attachment candidate for the WorkLoops mini-reproof.

findings.title: Hosted lifecycle evidence is available
findings.summary: The proof inputs describe submit, approval, claim, heartbeat, completion, archive readback, and review-evidence attachment/list/readback behavior for a synthetic hosted WorkLoop path.
findings.recommendation: Attach this review artifact to the same synthetic plan/completion subject and verify list, archive, and audit readback.

findings.title: Public-safe boundary preserved
findings.summary: The reviewed evidence uses synthetic identifiers and avoids SMARTSEER, customer, tracker, credential, external deployment, production cloud, and private local path data.
findings.recommendation: Keep downstream attachment/readback fixtures synthetic and path-sanitized.

findings.title: Prior AIQL-shaped metadata was not independent
findings.summary: The earlier fixture represented AIQL-compatible metadata but explicitly did not invoke an external review engine or independent AIQL gate.
findings.recommendation: Use this artifact, not the prior completion metadata fixture, when proving independent review-evidence attachment/readback.

findings.title: Conformance gap note may be stale
findings.summary: One conformance fixture still records the old missing first-class review-evidence surface, while the proof README says the focused server test now exercises attachment, list readback, archive readback, and audit readback.
findings.recommendation: During the WorkLoops mini-reproof, prefer live test/readback evidence over the stale gap note or update the fixture if it is confirmed outdated.

evidenceLabels.label: AIQL contract
evidenceLabels.summary: AIQL WorkLoop review evidence contract with schemaVersion 1 and explicit reviewed target/execution mode fields.

evidenceLabels.label: Independent artifact
evidenceLabels.summary: This review is saved as a public-safe fixture, separate from WorkLoops completion metadata.

recommendation.summary: Use this independent AIQL artifact for WorkLoops first-class review-evidence attachment/readback testing, then record the readback result against the same plan or completion subject.
nextSteps: Attach examples/portfolio-proof-cycle-001/workloops-independent-aiql-review.json to the synthetic WorkLoops plan or completion.
Read it back through WorkLoops list, archive, and audit surfaces.
Record whether the stale conformance gap note still reflects current WorkLoops behavior.

gateResult.command: manual structured review against docs/workloop-review-evidence.md and schemas/workloop-review-evidence.schema.json
